name: Sour Cherry Soup Wvhv17a
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Sour cherries, pitted and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the cherries with sugar and cinnamon for 10 to 15 minutes.
2. Remove the cinnamon stick.
3. Blend flour with a little of the cold water (6 tablespoons).
4. Stir in the remaining cold water.
5. Add the flour mixture and cherry mixture into a blender and blend until smooth.
6. Pour the flour mixture and cherry mixture into a pot, then add 3 cups of water.
7. Return to heat and bring to boiling.
8. Chill before serving.
9. Before serving, stir in chilled cream and red wine.
